reviews.comment:
Destaco la cordialidad y la atención por parte de Lucas ya que es en la única  Unidad Servicial del ACA que mantienen la predisposición para limpiar parabrisas y ópticas cuando ven que entras a cargar combustible y está el vidrio y luces sucias de la ruta. 10 puntos

(Translated by Google)
I would like to highlight Lucas's friendliness and attentiveness, as this is the only ACA Service Unit that is available to clean the windshield and headlights when they see you entering to fill up with fuel and the glass and lights are dirty from the road. 10 points
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7293247840782148336/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtM0tDckdnEAE
